text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've come to observe a race.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is still going, going, annnd gone! Seiun
Sky goes gate to wire, and it wasn't even close!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yep, feels good to be first. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Sei! You were unstoppable!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks, Spe! Can't believe you fell for it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Fell for what?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Not telling! ♪ It's the secret sauce to my
strength.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Did you have some kind of strategy planned
out?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Curious? Should I let you in? Oh, whatever shall I
do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
After all, I might want to use the same strat to win
again next time we race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Who knows, maybe my evil plans are already in
motion! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Argh, you're a tough cookie to crack! But I won't
give up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm! ♪ I'm looking forward to next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I spot them again on my way home.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, hm, hmmm! ♪ Phew... good thing my
concert worked out, eh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You seem a little different today, Sei. Something
about you is... off.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're always super clever and hard to get a
grasp on, like a slippery eel...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But right now, you seem really genuine and
honest!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? So, you're saying the normal me is not genuine and honest?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, um! No, that's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know. It's just that... Well, I'm happy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I put in so much hard work to win, so it's only
natural for me to feel this way.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I guess honesty is really your policy, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're straight as an arrow, and that's what I love
about you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Ack. Now you're the one being way too honest, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you perhaps... embarrassed?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...C-c'mon, we're gonna break curfew.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Let's hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Wait up, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You want me to be honest? Well, I'll show you
honest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Right now... I'm super sleepy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sooo, I'm gonna sleep, 'kay? Yaaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaargh! Wait just a minute, Sei!
